cases.name: stress_results
cases.prompt: Help me write Nature-style Results for a COMSOL solid-mechanics stress simulation.
must_check: geometry, material model, loads, constraints, mesh, solver, validation, and claim boundaries
no causal or design-superiority claim without validation
ready-to-use Results text plus missing inputs and reviewer-risk flags

cases.name: mesh_convergence_reply
cases.prompt: A reviewer says our mesh convergence is insufficient. Help me reply.
must_check: distinguish existing evidence from proposed additional analysis
request or expose mesh levels, monitored quantities, and convergence tolerance

cases.name: contact_figure_audit
cases.prompt: Does this COMSOL contact-pressure figure support our claim about wear reduction?
must_check: separate contact-pressure distribution from wear mechanism
flag missing friction, contact formulation, experimental wear validation, and mesh refinement near contact
suggest figure panels that would support the claim

cases.name: methods_reporting
cases.prompt: Write the Methods for a thermal-mechanical COMSOL model.
must_check: COMSOL version, physics interfaces, coupling, material properties, boundary conditions, mesh, solver, and outputs
no fabricated values or software versions

cases.name: review_risk_audit
cases.prompt: Check the reviewer risk of this COMSOL mechanical simulation manuscript.
must_check: missing inputs, risk severity, and concrete fixes
